_source_of_truth: design-system/tokens/ (Rev C). Do not edit values here without deriving them from the token layer. background=--ink, caption_text=--text-on-ink, caption_highlight/progress_bar=--gold-bright (data-highlight-ink), progress_bar_bg=--border-ink, caption font=--font-sans @ --w-bold.

fonts.caption: Supreme, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
